title: Quality gate: build, lint, and full test run pass
acceptance_criteria: 'npm run build' exits 0 with no TypeScript errors. 'npm run lint' exits 0 with no lint errors in src/cli/ or tests/cli/. 'npm test' exits 0 with all tests passing (existing + new CLI tests). Any lint or build fixes needed are made in this task.
notes:
model: cheap-tier
depends-on: gh-toy-m5w.6 (formal bd dep blocked by db schema error)

title: Unit tests for CLI (validation, client, subcommands, help)
acceptance_criteria: tests/cli/ directory exists with unit tests covering: (1) validation helper rejects empty string '' and whitespace-only '  ' (both cases) with flag name in message; (2) client wrapper throws CliError on non-2xx and on network failure without leaking stack; (3) at least one test per subcommand verifying argument parsing and correct HTTP method/path/body (mock the client); (4) --help exits 0 and prints usage; (5) unknown subcommand exits non-zero. 'npm test' passes all new and existing tests.
notes:
model: standard-tier
depends-on: gh-toy-m5w.3, gh-toy-m5w.4, gh-toy-m5w.5 (formal bd dep blocked by db schema error)

title: Help system, unknown-subcommand handling, error UX polish
acceptance_criteria: 'notecli --help' and 'notecli -h' print global usage listing all five subcommands and exit 0. 'notecli <subcommand> --help' prints per-subcommand usage and exits 0. Unknown subcommand prints usage to stderr and exits non-zero. All error paths (validation, network, API non-2xx) print human-readable messages with no stack traces and use non-zero exit codes consistently.
notes:
model: standard-tier
depends-on: gh-toy-m5w.1 (formal bd dep blocked by db schema error)

title: create, update, delete subcommands (write ops + flag validation)
acceptance_criteria: 'notecli create --title <t> --content <c>' POSTs and prints created note; rejects empty/blank --title or --content with clear error and non-zero exit. 'notecli update --id <id> [--title <t>] [--content <c>]' PUTs; requires at least one of --title or --content; rejects empty/blank values for any provided flag. 'notecli delete --id <id>' DELETEs and exits 0 on success. All three exit non-zero on API error with clean message (no stack trace). All use the client wrapper and validation helpers.
notes:
model: standard-tier
depends-on: gh-toy-m5w.2 (formal bd dep blocked by db schema error)

title: list and read subcommands (read-only)
acceptance_criteria: 'notecli list [--tag <tag>] [--q <query>]' calls GET /notes with optional query params and prints API response to stdout. 'notecli read --id <id>' calls GET /notes/:id and prints the note. Both exit non-zero on API error (non-2xx or network failure) with a clean error message (no stack trace). Both use the client wrapper and validation helpers.
notes:
model: standard-tier
depends-on: gh-toy-m5w.2 (formal bd dep blocked by db schema error)

title: HTTP client wrapper + CLI argument validation helpers
acceptance_criteria: src/cli/client.ts exports an HTTP client that takes baseUrl (default http://localhost:3000), method, path, body; returns parsed JSON on 2xx; throws a typed CliError (not generic Error) on non-2xx or network failure with status and message; no stack traces leaked. src/cli/validation.ts exports a helper that rejects empty or whitespace-only strings naming the failing flag (reuses src/utils/validation.ts conventions where applicable). Both modules compile and are exercised by at least one smoke import in src/cli/index.ts.
notes:
model: standard-tier
depends-on: gh-toy-m5w.1 (formal bd dep blocked by db schema error)

title: CLI scaffold: src/cli/index.ts + commander dep + bin wiring
acceptance_criteria: commander added to package.json deps; src/cli/index.ts compiles and runs via 'npx ts-node src/cli/index.ts --help' showing program name; npm run build produces dist/cli/index.js; tsconfig includes src/cli/; no subcommand logic yet (placeholder root command only)

title: CLI CRUD commands (list/read/create/update/delete)
description: Implement five subcommands against the NoteAPI: list (optional --tag/--q filter), read (--id required), create (--title, --content required), update (--id required, --title/--content optional), delete (--id required). Each command calls the API and prints results to stdout. Non-zero exit on API error.

title: CLI help system and input validation
description: The CLI must support --help/-h flags globally and per subcommand, printing usage and exiting 0. Input validation must reject empty or whitespace-only arguments with a clear error message and non-zero exit code. No stack traces in error output.

title: Add input validation for empty or blank strings
description: When user passes empty string or whitespace-only string as argument, reject with clear error message. Non-zero exit code. Add unit test. Ref: gh-toy-v6z.

title: Add --version flag to CLI
description: The CLI tool should support a --version (or -v) flag that prints the current version string and exits with code 0. Acceptance: running ./tool --version prints fleet-e2e-toy v1.0.0, exit code 0, works alongside other flags.

title: Add config file support (~/.fleet-e2e-toy.yaml)
description: Allow users to persist default flag values in a YAML config file at ~/.fleet-e2e-toy.yaml so they don't have to repeat common flags on every run. Acceptance: reads config on startup, CLI flags override config, warns on unknown keys, documents supported keys in README.

title: Handle SIGINT gracefully (Ctrl-C)
description: The tool should catch SIGINT (Ctrl-C) and exit cleanly without a Python traceback or incomplete output. Acceptance: Ctrl-C prints 'Interrupted.' and exits with code 130, no stack trace shown, partial output files cleaned up.

title: Add JSON output mode via --json flag
description: Add a --json flag so all command output can be emitted as machine-readable JSON for scripting and CI pipelines. Acceptance: --json flag accepted on any subcommand, output is valid JSON, human-readable output is default, errors also JSON-formatted.

title: Tag filtering endpoint
description: GET /api/notes?tag=work returns only notes with that tag. Already partially implemented - needs tests.
